positive: A sophisticated, highly detailed celestial map and botanical wreath design, rendered in a vintage engraving style. The central composition features interlocking motifs of delicate ferns, blooming night flowers, and stylized crescent moons, surrounded by constellations drawn with fine lines. The artwork must have strong, high-contrast silhouettes and a deep, aged aesthetic, simulating the look of antique copper etching or gold foil stamping on deep indigo paper. Symmetrical and perfectly balanced for apparel printing, with intricate cross-hatching and fine pointillism detail. Full frame coverage, centered design.
